/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -march=armv8.2-a+fp16+dotprod -mtune=cortex-a76 -Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic -Wshadow -Wnull-dereference -Wformat=2 -Wno-unused-parameter -O3 -ffast-math -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/zenohpico_shared.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,libzenohpico.so -o ../lib/libzenohpico.so CMakeFiles/zenohpico_shared.dir/src/api/admin_space.c.o CMakeFiles/zenohpico_shared.dir/src/api/advanced_publisher.c.o CMakeFiles/zenohpico_shared.dir/src/api/advanced_subscriber.c.o CMakeFiles/zenohpico_shared.dir/src/api/api.c.o
